events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV first hit our screens! The first video? The Buggles, 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is not lost on us.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, in the UK.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. A true Britpop masterpiece that still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, music, and a whole lot of history.

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. 49 years since Elvis Presley left us, but his legacy and music live on forever.

events.title: Tupac Shakur would have been 55
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who passed away on September 13, 1996, and would have been 55 today.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the lyrical genius and enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 today. His music continues to resonate.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix on September 18, 1970, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His influence on music is immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in music history. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and inspiring generations with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and solo star Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll energy.

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine released in UK 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1975, as part of the 'Shaved Fish' compilation.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released in the UK. A timeless message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. It completely changed how we listen to music. What was your first iPod model?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate 007 theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
